titleStmt.title: SII 34.236: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 236. Tiruvēngavāsal, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa, in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājādhirāja I, 30th year = A.D. 1048.
Seems to make an inventory of all the dēvadāna lands belonging to the temple of Tiruvēṅgaivāyil. The lands were located in different villages like Mayilāppūr, Chuṉaiyūr, Tiruveṭpūr and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiṅkaḷErtaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkīḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malar makaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkOlOccik karuṅkali kaṭintu tan ciṟiya tātaiyayum tirut tamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikoḷ tan niḷaṅkOkkaṉaiyum neṟiyuṇar tanṟi ruppu talavar tammaiyum tuṉṟeḻil vānavan vallavan mīṉavan kaṅka pulaṅkeḻilap pallavaṉ kaṉṉakkucciyar kāvalaṉeṉap ponaṇiccuṭar maṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭar pukaḻāṅ kavarkkava ṭaruppaḷu palūḻiyuṭṭeṉṉavar mu ṇaṉ
ṉmuṭiyānāp paruma tiṭp pacuntalaip porukaḷattarintu vārarai viyan kaḻil vīra kēraḷanai muṉaivayiṟpiṭittut tanetivāraṇak katakkaṭak kaḷiṟṟā lutaippittaruḷi Antamil peru pukaḻ cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkā m veṅkaḷat tiḻantuṉ muṭi ḻattalai viritta tōṭattō lkalil vēṇāṭṭaracaic cēṇāṭṭotukki pukaḻirāmakuṭamūvarai keḻamunintu viṭarkeḻu villavaṉ kuṭar maṭikkoṇṭu tannāṭu viṭṭō
ṭik kāṭu pukkoḷippa vañciyam potumalar malaintaṅkeñcalil vēlai keḻu kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuppit tāhavamallanumañcak kēvutaṟṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavan cēnai kaṇṭappa ppaṉakāṟum vaṇṭār kaḷiṟṟōṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal varaiyu ti nuvakarumuraṭ cāṅkamaiyanum mutalinar samarabhīru Ot rcuṭaṟ ponnōṭayaṅkerip puraviyōṭum piṭittu ttanṉāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅkoṇṭu nnār koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷeri maṭuppi
ttoru tanittaṇṭāṟ porukaṭa lilaṅkaiyar kōmakaṉ vikkirama bāhup perumaṇi makuṭa muṉṟanak kuṭaintu tenṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻan tēḻkaṭalīḻam pukkilaṅkēśvaranākiya vikkaramapāṇṭiyan parumaṇi makuṭamum kāṇṭaku taṉ na ttā kanṉa kucciyilu mārkali līḻañ cīritenṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷa nāṭu taṉnuṟavōṭum pukuntu vēkan pōrkkaḷattañci kār kaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyiṭṭōṭik kātaliyōṭu vayaip piṭittu ttāyai mūkkarintu Āṅkavamānīṅki
taṟkāka mīṭṭumantu vāṭṭoḻiliḻantu veṅkaḷattu vanta vacciṅkaḷattaracan ponṉaṇimuṭiyum kannaraṉṟuḻi vantu koḷīḻattarayanākiya cīrvallava matanarācaṉ ve loḷinta karumaṇimuṭiyuṅkoṇṭu vaṭapulattirukālāvatum porupa ttikkaṇṭaṉ tinakaran nāraṇan kaṇava vaṇṭalar teriyalar maticūtaṉnenṟēṉaip palavaracarrai mu turatti vampalar tarupoḻil ka ḷḷukkiyar māḷikai takarppit tiḷakka villavar mīnavar vēḻkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar kōcalar
ciṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturaraiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar Antiramutalinar Araiciṭu tiṟaikaḷu māṟilon ṟavaniyiṟ ka poruḷkaḷum Ukantu koḷak kuṭuttu viśvalōkattu viḷaṅkumanu neṟi niṉṟaśvamēdhañ cētaraicu vīṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacōḻa ṉuyarnta perumpukaḻk kōrājakēsaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājadevaṟkku yā[ ṇṭu 3 10] Āvatu jayaciṅka kulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu t tēvatānan tiruvēṅkaivāyil Uṭaiyāṟku Iṉnāṭṭu Ūrkaḷil Iṟaiyili Uṭaiya nilam E In
ta nilatēvatānam tiruvēṅkaivāyil Akavayal nilam kālum Ivvūrk kuṭikkāṭu ciṟuvayal kalam mūnṟumā kāṇiyum sabhaiyār vayal nilam mākkā piḷḷaiyār vayal nilam nālumāvum piṭāranērivayal Onṟe Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟēmukkālumāvum te na pparu cunaiyūrkku vayal nilam Oṉṟē Iraṇṭumāvum Ivvūrkuṭikkāṭṭu kanērinilam mukkālē A raikāṇiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭē Eḻumāvaraikkāṇiyum tēvatānam ceytu naṟikan vitikuṭi ti
miyār vayal vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟu nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇiyum tēvatānam celvikuṭik kuṭikkāvaṟ ciṟu ravayal nilam Oṉṟaraiyum tēvatānam mayilāppūril nilam On vatānam Oru maṇimaṅkalattār vayanilam Araiyē mākāṇi Araikkāṇiyum mayilāppūr vayalil Ittēvar tēvatānam vāram nilam kālum Āka Iṉnā paḻampaṭi Uṭaiya nilam Eṭṭēkālum tenkavira nāṭṭu ttiru vēṭpūrppāl kuṭikkāṭṭil Ittēva
tēvatānam nilam Onpatumāvum pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu Akakiḷiyūr nāṭṭu vaṟuṭumaṅkalattu Uḷḷurkkaḷai Ittēvaṟku pakkalum kkālil nānkumā Innilam paḻampaṭi Eṭukiṟiya tēvatānam §
Digital edition of SII 34.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
